test_cases.input_summary: Hard news — NHS waiting list at 8.5 million, government targets 7.5m by year end via weekend surgery, GP expansion, and triage; clinicians warn 12,000 theatre nurses unrecruited. Target: national broadsheet web standfirst.

Magazine feature — profile of six painters aged 58-74 who trained pre-internet; feature argues skills gap is two-directional (old can't do hex codes, young lack studio fundamentals). Target: national culture magazine print dek.

Digital-first with SEO — Land Registry data shows 31% rise in small-town first-time buyer completions, 9% fall in cities; SEO target is 'first-time buyer locations UK 2024'. Target: property news website web standfirst.
